title: Exodus 14:27
description: Fixes MC-278019 bug to restore sea level in superflat worlds.
body:
![Exodus 14:27 Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03bfaf544c0239421ca3c743fb41667d02fdb645.png)

<small>*"Moses stretched out his hand over the sea, and at daybreak the sea went back to its place."*</small>

![Text Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f071dc11a15554bae3832cbb8ba1af012c241581.png)

This mod patches bug [MC-278019](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC/issues/MC-278019) that makes sea level in superflat worlds begin at `y-level -63` and manually sets the sea level to begin at `y-level 63`. This fixes the need to be below `y-level -63` to stop phantoms spawning, and allows natural aquatic mob generation including nautiluses.

**Check out the video below that includes this mod in action.** 

[Video coming soon...]
